name: Central Detroit Christian
description_short: Central Detroit Christian is a credit repair provider based in Detroit, Michigan. Rated 4.4/5 with 112 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Central Detroit Christian is a credit repair provider serving clients in Detroit, Michigan. With 112 Google reviews and a 4.4/5.0 rating, Central Detroit Christian has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a social services organization, Central Detroit Christian provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Detroit, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Central Detroit Christian operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Detroit, Michigan area who are considering Central Detroit Christian should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.
